persona.title: VP Mission Systems
persona.problem_ownership_reason: Owns payload architecture and schedule risk for satellites entering build and integration windows.

accounts.angle: As Xona scales its satellite roadmap, an optical payload partner with fast-turn integration can reduce schedule slip risk before procurement hardens.
accounts.why_now_signal: Xona publicly announced strategic funding to scale commercial PNT infrastructure.
accounts.product_fit: Peregrine can deliver compact optical payload options aligned to SWaP and program cadence constraints.
accounts.voice_notes: Direct, technical, low-hype. Lead with mission timing and execution risk, then ask one short question.

persona.title: Director of Payload Engineering
persona.problem_ownership_reason: Responsible for integrating and validating payload subsystems under tight launch timelines.

accounts.angle: As Umbra grows constellation capacity, adding flexible optical payload options can unlock new collection products without extending schedule risk.
accounts.why_now_signal: Umbra has publicly announced new financing and satellite expansion milestones.
accounts.product_fit: Peregrine offers payload configurations optimized for rapid integration cycles.
accounts.voice_notes: Plain language, no fluff, avoid overpromising.

persona.title: Chief Engineer
persona.problem_ownership_reason: Balances performance tradeoffs across sensor payload roadmaps and satellite bus constraints.

accounts.angle: Mission operators expanding RF intelligence capabilities can benefit from complementary optical payload paths that fit existing deployment cadences.
accounts.why_now_signal: HawkEye 360 has publicly announced growth funding and ongoing constellation deployment activity.
accounts.product_fit: Peregrine can support optical payload integration planning for parallel sensor strategy.
accounts.voice_notes: Confident but not aggressive; use uncertainty language.

persona.title: Senior Program Manager, Space Systems
persona.problem_ownership_reason: Owns subcontractor timing and supplier readiness for near-term deployment cycles.

accounts.angle: When EO operators run rapid revisit roadmaps, a payload supplier that can move fast is often more valuable than legacy heritage labels alone.
accounts.why_now_signal: BlackSky continues to announce Gen-3 growth and service expansion initiatives publicly.
accounts.product_fit: Peregrine can support fast-turn procurement windows with compact payload builds.
accounts.voice_notes: Keep it short and factual; one claim tied to one signal.

persona.title: Head of Space Programs
persona.problem_ownership_reason: Owns vendor decisions affecting timeline, cost, and payload performance outcomes.

accounts.angle: For operators under pressure to expand imagery capacity efficiently, an agile payload partner can lower integration friction.
accounts.why_now_signal: Satellogic has publicly communicated commercial contract momentum and constellation operations updates.
accounts.product_fit: Peregrine provides configurable payload options for practical deployment windows.

persona.title: Director, Mission Payloads
persona.problem_ownership_reason: Owns mission payload roadmap and tradeoffs between speed, capability, and supplier risk.

accounts.angle: Defense-focused SAR providers can benefit from optical payload options that complement existing missions without forcing long supplier onboarding.
accounts.why_now_signal: ICEYE continues to publish defense partnership announcements and program expansion updates.
accounts.product_fit: Peregrine can serve as a fast-moving payload supplier for hybrid mission concepts.

persona.title: VP Supplier Programs
persona.problem_ownership_reason: Owns subsystem supplier pipeline and schedule certainty for multi-customer satellite programs.

accounts.angle: Bus manufacturers under delivery pressure need payload suppliers that can align to integration windows with fewer handoff delays.
accounts.why_now_signal: Terran Orbital has public backlog and program execution announcements tied to ongoing satellite production.
accounts.product_fit: Peregrine offers payload hardware paths designed for faster supplier coordination.

persona.title: Director of Program Engineering
persona.problem_ownership_reason: Owns subsystem integration risk and timeline for defense and commercial customer missions.

accounts.angle: As York expands mission cadence, payload partners that reduce integration churn can protect delivery timelines.
accounts.why_now_signal: York has publicly announced new mission awards and growth in production programs.
accounts.product_fit: Peregrine can provide payload support compatible with schedule-driven bus programs.
accounts.voice_notes: Sound like a peer operator, not a seller.

persona.title: Senior Capture Manager, Space ISR
persona.problem_ownership_reason: Needs qualified payload partners to strengthen bids and reduce execution uncertainty.

accounts.angle: Capture teams pursuing fast-turn ISR programs need payload suppliers that can support proposal timelines and technical confidence.
accounts.why_now_signal: L3Harris has public contract announcements tied to space ISR and mission systems delivery.
accounts.product_fit: Peregrine can support subcontract payload needs for schedule-sensitive opportunities.

persona.problem_ownership_reason: Owns delivery commitments and partner performance for mission payload programs.

persona.title: Director, Mission Architecture

accounts.product_fit: Peregrine can provide payload options that support iterative mission planning.
